message:
fix(freeze): fix codegen bugs for JSArray path and to_propkey

- Skip __jsarray__ condition checks in JSArray native path (array is always valid)
- Don't generate JSArray native function for functions with put_array_el
- Fix to_propkey to use isStr() instead of isString() (CompressedValue method)
- Add toString() wrapper to JSValueWasm32 and JSValueNative

Note: mandelbrot Binary GC assertion is a pre-existing issue not addressed here.
